name: wkea-quotation-management-expert
description: WKEA quotation management expert: create quotations, manage items, generate share links for customer WeChat view.

displayDescription.en: WKEA quotation management: create from demand or independently, add/remove items, sort, share via WeChat with short link and copy text.
displayDescription.zh: WKEA 报价单管理：从需求生成或独立创建，添加/删除产品，排序，生成分享短链接和复制文案供微信发送给客户。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 请告诉本专家你要创建或管理哪个报价单（提供需求 ID 或 SKU 列表）
defaultInitPrompt.en: Tell the expert which quotation to create or manage (demand ID or SKU list)

quickPrompts.zh: 请告诉本专家你要创建或管理哪个报价单（提供需求 ID 或 SKU 列表）
quickPrompts.en: Tell the expert which quotation to create or manage (demand ID or SKU list)

quickPrompts.zh: 把需求 D-2024-001 转成报价单
quickPrompts.en: Convert demand D-2024-001 to a quotation

quickPrompts.zh: 生成分享链接，主题「SMC 气缸报价」
quickPrompts.en: Generate share link with topic 'SMC cylinder quote'
